title: Support
lead: Open the support assistant to get help without leaving this page.
fallbackLead: The support assistant should open automatically. You can also open it here.
emptySubtitle: Ask a question or start with one of these topics.

suggestionPrompts.booking: I need help with a booking.
suggestionPrompts.cancel: I need help canceling a booking.
suggestionPrompts.provider: I want to become a provider.

disclaimer: AI support may make mistakes. It can check only limited support-safe order or payment details you select or reference.
error: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact support.

serverMessages.rateLimit: Too many support chat requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
serverMessages.outage: Support chat is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later or contact support.
serverMessages.empty: Please enter a support question so I can help.
serverMessages.abusive: I can help with support questions, but I cannot respond to abusive messages. Please contact support if you need help.
serverMessages.nonsense: I could not understand that request. Please rephrase your support question or contact support.
serverMessages.clarify: What are you trying to do: register, book a service, manage a provider profile, pay for an order, cancel, or dispute something?
serverMessages.unsupportedAccount: I can only check limited support-safe order, payment, or invoice details when you provide or select a specific item I can verify. I cannot browse full account history, unrelated orders, Stripe, or raw account records.
serverMessages.unsupportedAction: I can’t perform actions like canceling, refunding, charging, or updating an order from this chat. I can explain the rules or help you check support-safe eligibility for a selected order.
serverMessages.uncertain: I do not have enough support information to answer that reliably. I can help with general registration, provider setup, booking, payment, cancellation, dispute, and marketplace usage questions. For this specific issue, please contact support.

handoffAccount: For account-specific help, contact support with your order, invoice, or account details.
handoffGeneral: If this does not answer your question, contact support for help.
